hero.title: Compassionate Early
hero.subtitle: Powered by AI
hero.description: A supportive platform connecting parents, doctors, and therapists to enable earlier understanding, guided screening, and personalized care.

agents.title: Our Intelligent Support Ecosystem
agents.description: The platform seamlessly integrates four specialized AI agents that work in harmony to support every step of your journey—from initial screening to clinical review and therapy planning.

screening.name: Screening Agent
screening.description: Analyzes behavior patterns from screening inputs.

clinical.name: Clinical Summary Agent
clinical.description: Builds structured clinical summaries for doctors.

therapy.name: Therapy Planning Agent
therapy.description: Suggests therapy direction and session focus.

monitoring.name: Monitoring Agent
monitoring.description: Tracks child progress and trend indicators.

features.title: How It Works
features.description: Our multi-agent AI system works alongside healthcare professionals to provide comprehensive early screening and care.

aiScreening.title: AI-Powered Screening
aiScreening.description: Advanced behavioral analysis using video and questionnaires

multiRole.title: Multi-Role Platform
multiRole.description: Dedicated interfaces for parents, doctors, and therapists

humanLoop.title: Human-in-the-Loop
humanLoop.description: AI supports decisions, professionals remain in control

auth.selectRole: Choose your role to get started

parent.title: Parent
parent.description: Monitor your child's development and access screening tools

doctor.title: Doctor
doctor.description: Review screenings and provide clinical assessments

therapist.title: Therapist
therapist.description: Create therapy plans and track session progress
